nasb.text: As they remember their children, So they remember their altars and their Asherim By green trees on the high hills.

esv.text: while their children remember their altars and their Asherim, beside every green tree and on the high hills,

cnv.text: 他們的兒女也懷念著 那些在各高岡上、 在繁茂樹旁的祭壇和亞舍拉。

ccb.text: 他们的儿女没有忘记绿树下、高岗上、
